case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PLTF'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,180.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION (SUMMARY JUDGMENT) VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-25-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL IS GRANTED. THE SUPPLEMENTAL PAPERS TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
ORDER TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BOND

ADDENDUM TO MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND; SUPPLEMENTAL MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES WITH ADDITIONAL GROUNDS FOR RELIEF; DECLARATION OF BRAD PETERSEN FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
OPPOSITION TO MOTION BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
